title: SpeakerSegmentV2
description:
One raw speaker diarization segment returned by Python.

Timing fields validated upstream by Python Pydantic models (see module docs).

speaker.description: Stable speaker label chosen by the model adapter.

DurationMs.description:
Duration or audio position measured in milliseconds.

Used for audio timestamps (`start_ms`, `end_ms`) and durations
(`max_group_ms`, `tight_buffer_ms`) throughout the FA, ASR, and
speaker pipelines. All ML worker IPC timing fields use this type.
